title: hieracium hypopogon
intro: Hieracium hypopogon, also known as Devil's-bit scabious, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Hieracium hypopogon include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Hieracium hypopogon is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
